name: LinkedIn: Jobs Search
summary: Search LinkedIn Jobs read-only and return up to max_jobs result cards with title, company, location, job URL, and footer flags.
description: Open LinkedIn Jobs (/jobs/) in the existing session, build a filtered jobs-search URL from keywords/location/date_posted/remote, scroll the result list, and return a flat array of job cards. Each item carries job_id, title, company, location, an absolute /jobs/view/ URL, and footer flags (Promoted / Easy Apply / Viewed). Read-only: never applies, saves, or messages. Use linkedin_job_detail to expand one job by id.

keywords.description: Job search keywords (e.g. "learning consultant"). URL-encoded automatically.

location.description: Location filter (e.g. "Bengaluru"). Omit for any location.

date_posted.description: How recently the job was posted. Maps to the f_TPR filter. Defaults to any.

remote.description: On-site / remote / hybrid filter. Maps to the f_WT filter. Defaults to any.

max_jobs.description: Maximum number of job cards to return. Defaults to 25. Hard cap 50.

steps.name: Open LinkedIn Jobs in the existing session (bootstrap tab before execute_javascript)
Allow the jobs home to hydrate

inputs.script: const c=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;}; const kw=c(arg0); const loc=c(arg1); let opt={}; try{opt=JSON.parse(c(arg2)||'{}');}catch(e){opt={};} const dp=c(opt.date_posted); const rm=c(opt.remote); const params=new URLSearchParams(); params.set('keywords',kw); if(loc)params.set('location',loc); const tpr={past_month:'r2592000',past_week:'r604800',past_24h:'r86400'}; if(tpr[dp])params.set('f_TPR',tpr[dp]); const wt={on_site:'1',remote:'2',hybrid:'3'}; if(wt[rm])params.set('f_WT',wt[rm]); const url='https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/search/?'+params.toString(); setTimeout(()=>location.assign(url),0); return {search_url:url};

steps.name: Build the filtered jobs-search URL and navigate to it
Allow jobs search results to hydrate
Dismiss popups if present after navigation
Wait for the job result cards
Scroll until roughly max_jobs cards are loaded

inputs.script: const c=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;}; let max=parseInt(c(arg0),10); if(!Number.isFinite(max)||max<1)max=25; if(max>50)max=50; const norm=(v)=>(v||'').replace(/\u00a0/g,' ').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim(); const txt=(el)=>el?norm(el.innerText||el.textContent||''):''; const firstLine=(el)=>{if(!el)return '';return norm((el.innerText||el.textContent||'').split('\n')[0]);}; const cleanUrl=(a)=>{if(!a)return '';try{const u=new URL(a.getAttribute('href'),location.origin);return u.origin+u.pathname;}catch(e){return a.getAttribute('href')||'';}}; const cards=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('li[data-occludable-job-id]')); const out=[]; const seen=new Set(); for(const li of cards){ const id=li.getAttribute('data-occludable-job-id')||''; if(!id||seen.has(id))continue; const titleEl=li.querySelector('a.job-card-container__link')||li.querySelector('a.job-card-list__title')||li.querySelector('.artdeco-entity-lockup__title'); const title=firstLine(titleEl); const company=txt(li.querySelector('.artdeco-entity-lockup__subtitle')); const location=txt(li.querySelector('.artdeco-entity-lockup__caption')); const job_url=cleanUrl(li.querySelector('a[href*="/jobs/view/"]')); const footer=li.querySelector('.job-card-container__footer-wrapper'); const flags=footer?((footer.innerText||footer.textContent||'').replace(/\s*\n+\s*/g,' / ').replace(/[ \t]+/g,' ').trim()):''; seen.add(id); out.push({job_id:id,title:title,company:company,location:location,job_url:job_url,flags:flags}); if(out.length>=max)break; } return out;

steps.name: Extract job cards (job_id, title, company, location, job_url, flags)

help.summary: Search LinkedIn Jobs read-only and return up to max_jobs result cards.

parameters.keywords: Job search keywords (e.g. "learning consultant"). Required. URL-encoded automatically.
parameters.location: Location filter (e.g. "Bengaluru"). Omit for any location.
parameters.date_posted: any | past_month | past_week | past_24h. Maps to f_TPR. Default any.
parameters.remote: any | on_site | remote | hybrid. Maps to f_WT. Default any.
parameters.max_jobs: Maximum number of job cards to return. Default 25, max 50.

examples.command: rzn-browser run linkedin jobs-search --param keywords="learning consultant" --param location="Bengaluru"
examples.description: Return up to 25 jobs matching "learning consultant" in Bengaluru.

examples.command: rzn-browser run linkedin jobs-search --param keywords="digital learning" --param date_posted="past_week" --param remote="remote" --param max_jobs=40
examples.description: Up to 40 remote "digital learning" jobs posted in the past week.

returns: Array of job cards: { job_id, title, company, location, job_url, flags } (flags is the footer line, e.g. "Promoted / Easy Apply").
notes: Read-only. Never applies, saves, or messages.
Requires an existing logged-in LinkedIn session.
date_posted maps to f_TPR (r2592000 / r604800 / r86400); remote maps to f_WT (1 / 2 / 3).
Use linkedin_job_detail to expand a single job by job_id.
